description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, geometric design with a rich walnut wood finish. The front face is composed of multiple rectangular drawer fronts arranged in a staggered, brick-like pattern, giving it a distinctive and contemporary look. The sides and top are smooth, flat panels of matching wood grain, with no visible handles or hardware, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The drawers appear to be handleless, likely utilizing a push-to-open mechanism. The base is slightly recessed, creating a subtle floating effect. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, high-quality piece suitable for both residential and urban public spaces.
description: A modern walnut chest of drawers with a staggered, handleless front and smooth, minimalist sides and top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staggered, brick-like arrangement of the drawer fronts.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a smooth, uninterrupted wood panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, flat wood panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a smooth wood panel and no visible drawers.
